phase_meaning: Trend, liquidity, and earnings expectations support risk assets.
rewarded_behavior: Holding core exposure, adding pullbacks, letting winners compound.
common_mistake: Overtrading a healthy uptrend or chasing after sharp extensions.
stress_meaning: Higher yields or weak duration pressure valuation multiples and long-duration growth.

pressure_detail.stress_meaning: Higher yields or weak duration pressure valuation multiples and long-duration growth.

allocation_posture.reason: Trend, liquidity, and earnings expectations support risk assets. Use ruled add zones, not chase.
allocation_posture.condition: Use ruled add zones, not chase.

phase_rule.condition: Use ruled add zones, not chase.

allocation_posture.tilt: Reduce marginal adds; favor profitable quality
allocation_posture.reason: Trend, liquidity, and earnings expectations support risk assets. Add only with route permission.
allocation_posture.condition: Add only with route permission. Stress adjustment: Reduce marginal adds; favor profitable quality.
allocation_posture.stress_adjustment: Reduce marginal adds; favor profitable quality

allocation_posture.reason: Trend, liquidity, and earnings expectations support risk assets. Upgrade only if breadth improves.

allocation_posture.tilt: Watch, do not accumulate aggressively until rates roll over
allocation_posture.reason: Trend, liquidity, and earnings expectations support risk assets. Add when rates roll over.
allocation_posture.condition: Add when rates roll over. Stress adjustment: Watch, do not accumulate aggressively until rates roll over.
allocation_posture.stress_adjustment: Watch, do not accumulate aggressively until rates roll over

allocation_posture.tilt: Small hedge if real-rate/geopolitical pressure confirms
allocation_posture.reason: Trend, liquidity, and earnings expectations support risk assets. Increase only if stress rises.
allocation_posture.condition: Increase only if stress rises. Stress adjustment: Small hedge if real-rate/geopolitical pressure confirms.
allocation_posture.stress_adjustment: Small hedge if real-rate/geopolitical pressure confirms

allocation_posture.tilt: Conditional if rate pressure is inflation-linked
allocation_posture.reason: Trend, liquidity, and earnings expectations support risk assets. Favor only with inflation/supply pressure.
allocation_posture.condition: Favor only with inflation/supply pressure. Stress adjustment: Conditional if rate pressure is inflation-linked.
allocation_posture.stress_adjustment: Conditional if rate pressure is inflation-linked

allocation_posture.reason: Trend, liquidity, and earnings expectations support risk assets. Deploy only into pullbacks or high-evidence ideas.
allocation_posture.condition: Deploy only into pullbacks or high-evidence ideas. Stress adjustment: Higher dry powder.

phase_rule.condition: Deploy only into pullbacks or high-evidence ideas.

allocation_posture.reason: Trend, liquidity, and earnings expectations support risk assets. Cut if liquidity beta breaks.
Trend, liquidity, and earnings expectations support risk assets. Evidence >= 80 or deep undervaluation with strong thesis.
allocation_posture.condition: Evidence >= 80 or deep undervaluation with strong thesis.

phase_rule.condition: Evidence >= 80 or deep undervaluation with strong thesis.

equity_posture.condition: Only with liquidity and route confirmation.
Stability role, not primary upside engine.
Works when breadth and cyclicals participate.
Upgrade only if credit and breadth improve.
Favor if rates/curve help margins without credit stress.
Favor only if inflation/demand supports energy.

phase_invalidation: SPX loses 200D or VIX stress rises above route threshold.
next_phase_watch: Watch sentiment/breadth for late-cycle euphoria or rate rollover for healthier expansion.

cleanup_recommendation.reason: Macro Cycle Board now overlaps with it, but validators/downstream dependencies may still expect it.
Redundant with Cross-Asset Lens + Macro Cycle Board, but prior removal broke build.
Parked; adds abstraction without stable value.
